data.title: Apple TV+ Bleeding Over $1 Billion Yearly As Streaming War Heats Up: Report
data.description: The streaming service of Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), Apple TV+, is reportedly incurring annual losses exceeding $1 billion.

data.title: Retired Investor With 13-Year Vanguard Strategy Asks 'Where Do I Go In Vanguard?' – Wants Out Of Tesla And Meta Amid Market Fears
data.description: For many, the dream of retiring comfortably is built on decades of disciplined investing in the right assets.

data.title: Why Avista, Hershey, And Virtus Investment Partners Are Winners For Passive Income
Cathie Wood Bets On Elon Musk's Tesla Despite Cybertruck Recall, Dumps Zuckerberg's Meta Shares Again
data.description: On Thursday, March 20, 2025, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest purchases $2.2M in Tesla shares despite Cybertruck recalls and financial concerns, while simultaneously selling $2.7M of Meta stock amid the company's privacy challenges.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Activities Don't Breach Federal Securities Laws: SEC Clarifies Participants Need Not Register Transactions
data.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission clarified its position on cryptocurrency mining activities Thursday, asserting that they do not fall under federal securities laws.
